keyFacts: Santa unlocks during Christmas after buying A festive hat.
Each Santa evolution randomly unlocks one Santa upgrade until Final Claus unlocks Santa's dominion.
Santa upgrades are especially useful after getting Season switcher and going into Christmas first.
__summary.intro: Santa was first introduced during the Christmas (v1.04) update. Once A festive hat is purchased, an icon will appear under the Big Cookie reflecting Santa's current level. It can then be upgraded until Santa reaches his final form. Santa's level has little impact on the game, but every time he is upgraded, a random upgrade is unlocked. One of them is Santa's legacy which will grant an additive boost of 3% to your cookie production for each level of Santa, up to 45%. Santa's upgrades can be quite useful so once getting the season switcher it is recommended to use Christmas first.
allBonuses: 10% more powerful clicking (in addition to cookie production multipliers)
Reindeer appear twice as frequently, give twice as many cookies and are twice as slow.
__summary.notes: Upgrades which lower the cost of upgrades stack multiplicatively, not additively. That is, if you have 3 of them which reduce the cost of upgrades by 5%, 2% and 1% then the final cost of an upgrade is (original cost) * 0.95 * 0.98 * 0.99.
__summary.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text

__meta.schema: Santa stages and upgrades keyed by name. Metadata keys begin with __.

Santa overview.Name: Santa overview
Santa overview.description: Santa was first introduced during the Christmas (v1.04) update. Once A festive hat is purchased, an icon will appear under the Big Cookie reflecting Santa's current level. It can then be upgraded until Santa reaches his final form. Santa's level has little impact on the game, but every time he is upgraded, a random upgrade is unlocked. One of them is Santa's legacy which will grant an additive boost of 3% to your cookie production for each level of Santa, up to 45%. Santa's upgrades can be quite useful so once getting the season switcher it is recommended to use Christmas first.
Santa overview.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text

Santa full upgrade bonus summary.Name: Santa full upgrade bonus summary
Santa full upgrade bonus summary.description: Cookie production x235% Milk increased by 5% 1.99% cheaper buildings 6.9% cheaper upgrades 10% more powerful clicking (in addition to cookie production multipliers) Reindeer appear twice as frequently, give twice as many cookies and are twice as slow. Random drops are more common Grandmas are twice as productive
Santa full upgrade bonus summary.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text

A festive hat.Name: A festive hat
A festive hat.description: Unlocks... something. "Not a creature was stirring, not even a mouse."
A festive hat.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text

Increased merriness.Name: Increased merriness
Increased merriness.unlock condition: Purchasing "A festive hat" or evolving Santa
Increased merriness.description: Cookie production multiplier +15%. Cost scales with Santa level. "It turns out that the key to increased merriness, strangely enough, happens to be a good campfire and some s'mores. You know what they say, after all; the s'more, the merrier."
Increased merriness.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text

Improved jolliness.Name: Improved jolliness
Improved jolliness.unlock condition: Purchasing "A festive hat" or evolving Santa
Improved jolliness.description: Cookie production multiplier +15%. Cost scales with Santa level. "A nice wobbly belly goes a long way. You jolly?"
Improved jolliness.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text

A lump of coal.Name: A lump of coal
A lump of coal.unlock condition: Purchasing "A festive hat" or evolving Santa
A lump of coal.description: Cookie production multiplier +1%. Cost scales with Santa level. "Some of the world's worst stocking stuffing. I guess you could try starting your own little industrial revolution, or something?..."
A lump of coal.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text

An itchy sweater.Name: An itchy sweater
An itchy sweater.unlock condition: Purchasing "A festive hat" or evolving Santa
An itchy sweater.description: Cookie production multiplier +1%. Cost scales with Santa level. "You don't know what's worse : the embarrassingly quaint "elf on reindeer" motif, or the fact that wearing it makes you feel like you're wrapped in a dead sasquatch.
An itchy sweater.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text

Reindeer baking grounds.Name: Reindeer baking grounds
Reindeer baking grounds.unlock condition: Purchasing "A festive hat" or evolving Santa
Reindeer baking grounds.description: Reindeer appear twice as frequently. "Male reindeer are from Mars; female reindeer are from venison."
Reindeer baking grounds.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text

Weighted sleighs.Name: Weighted sleighs
Weighted sleighs.unlock condition: Purchasing "A festive hat" or evolving Santa
Weighted sleighs.description: Reindeer are twice as slow. Cost scales with Santa level. "Hope it was worth the weight. (Something something forced into cervidude)"
Weighted sleighs.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text

Ho ho ho-flavored frosting.Name: Ho ho ho-flavored frosting
Ho ho ho-flavored frosting.unlock condition: Purchasing "A festive hat" or evolving Santa
Ho ho ho-flavored frosting.description: Reindeer give twice as much. Cost scales with Santa level. "It's time to up the antler."
Ho ho ho-flavored frosting.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text

Season savings.Name: Season savings
Season savings.unlock condition: Purchasing "A festive hat" or evolving Santa
Season savings.description: All buildings are 1% cheaper. Cost scales with Santa level. "By Santa's beard, what savings! But who will save us?"
Season savings.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text

Toy workshop.Name: Toy workshop
Toy workshop.unlock condition: Purchasing "A festive hat" or evolving Santa
Toy workshop.description: All upgrades are 5% cheaper. [note 1] Cost scales with Santa level. "Watch yours-elf around elvesdroppers who might steal our production secrets. Or elven worse!"
Toy workshop.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text

Naughty list.Name: Naughty list
Naughty list.unlock condition: Purchasing "A festive hat" or evolving Santa
Naughty list.description: Grandmas are twice as productive. Cost scales with Santa level. "This list contains every unholy deed perpetuated by grandmakind. He won't be checking this one twice. Once. Once is enough."
Naughty list.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text

Santa's bottomless bag.Name: Santa's bottomless bag
Santa's bottomless bag.unlock condition: Purchasing "A festive hat" or evolving Santa
Santa's bottomless bag.description: Random drops are 10% more common. Cost scales with Santa level. "This is one bottom you can't check out."
Santa's bottomless bag.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text

Santa's helpers.Name: Santa's helpers
Santa's helpers.unlock condition: Purchasing "A festive hat" or evolving Santa
Santa's helpers.description: Clicking is 10% more powerful. Cost scales with Santa level. "Some choose to help hamburger; some choose to help you. To each their own, I guess."
Santa's helpers.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text

Santa's legacy.Name: Santa's legacy
Santa's legacy.unlock condition: Purchasing "A festive hat" or evolving Santa
Santa's legacy.description: Cookie production multiplier +3% per Santa's levels. Cost scales with Santa level. "In the north pole, you gotta get the elves first. Then when you get the elves, you start making the toys. Then when you get the toys... then you get the cookies."
Santa's legacy.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text

Santa's milk and cookies.Name: Santa's milk and cookies
Santa's milk and cookies.unlock condition: Purchasing "A festive hat" or evolving Santa
Santa's milk and cookies.description: Milk is 5% more powerful. Cost scales with Santa level. "Part of Santa's dreadfully unbalanced diet."
Santa's milk and cookies.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text

Santa's dominion.Name: Santa's dominion
Santa's dominion.unlock condition: Reach the final stage of Santa
Santa's dominion.description: Cookie production multiplier +20%. All buildings are 1% cheaper. All upgrades are 2% cheaper. [note 1] "My name is Claus, king of kings; Look on my toys, ye Mighty, and despair!"
Santa's dominion.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Santa pasted text
